title: Strangers in the Night
why_this_song: Strangers in the Night by Frank Sinatra (1966) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Love was just a glance away
A warm embracing dance away, and
Ever since that night we've been together
Lovers at first sight, in love forever
Strangers in the night exchanging glances
What were the chances we'd be sharing love

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "night" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "night" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "strangers" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "strangers" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Strangers in the night exchanging glances

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Strangers in the Night" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Strangers in the Night" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Strangers in the Night", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Strangers in the Night", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Strangers in the Night" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Strangers in the Night" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
